race.comment: BARBECUE SAUCE (1) Deep Field gelding resuming from a lengthy break. Ran on late in the heavy conditions when fourth over 900m at this track a year ago. Fitted with the two goos trials and gets his chance from the low draw. BELLA KATELYN (5) stalked the speed on debut with a tidy fourth over 1000m at Corowa. Can go on with it now and handle the conditions despite drawing out. ELASAND (7) on the quick back-up with a disappointing fifth from the inside gate over 1000m at Parkes. Assess on her good third to Star Of Lily two back at Moruya. Worth another chance. FORJORI (12) Cosmic Force two-year-old filly from Tejori on debut for the Neil Osborne yard. Wasn't pushed out when fourth in a recent 900m trial. Has claims from the gate.
